queue.name: V15
queue.purpose: BIG LEVER: train on 91 inline CoT examples (pre-tokenized) instead of raw train.csv rows. Expected LB delta per technique-backlog: 0.65 -> 0.85.
queue.depends_on: v13/v16 baseline submission landing first to anchor best_cv

queue.name: V16
queue.purpose: Ablation: rank=16 LoRA (half the params, ~2x faster training). Tests speed/quality tradeoff. Same corpus as V15.

queue.name: V17
queue.purpose: Select2Reason: keep only top-50% longest CoTs (highest-utility curation per konbu17 community insight). Same rank=32 + V15 corpus.
queue.depends_on: V15 submitted; ideally compare against V15 cv to validate curation hypothesis

queue.name: V18
queue.purpose: Bigger CoT corpus: 398 examples (4.4x V15) across bit_manipulation/cipher/gravity/numeral. More data = better trained adapter.
queue.depends_on: V15 or independent baseline; use instead of V15 for the run if not already submitted

post_iteration: user clicks browser Save & Run All; operator runs python tools/auto_submit.py --slug nvidia-nemotron-submission-demo --force when COMPLETE
